description: BWA-MEM2 alignment killed by the OOM killer under a tight memory cap
log_text: FATAL: task consumed all available RAM; the OOM killer terminated the process (exit code 137).

description: Salmon quantification cancelled after exceeding the scheduler wall-clock limit
log_text: slurmstepd: job exceeded its allocated wall-clock time limit and was cancelled by the scheduler.

description: samtools view fails because the BAM's .bai index sidecar is absent
log_text: Error: alignment index (.bai) missing for input.bam; run samtools index on the BAM before this step.

description: nf-core run invoked with an unrecognized CLI flag
log_text: ERROR ~ unrecognized arguments: --unknown_flag value; check the pipeline's parameter schema for the supported options.

description: Container pull rejected by the registry (private image, no auth)
log_text: docker: Error response from daemon: pull access denied for myregistry/fastqc, repository does not exist or may require 'docker login'.

description: samtools sort segfaults with no other recognizable signal
log_text: Segmentation fault (core dumped) in samtools sort -- unexpected crash, no further diagnostic output.

description: Post-run QC gate rejects the sample on an outlier duplication rate
log_text: QC gate rejected the run: MultiQC duplication-rate metric (92%) breached the assay's QC anomaly threshold.

description: Aligner cannot find the reference FASTA on this host
log_text: FATAL: No such file or directory: /references/GRCh38_no_alt.fasta -- reference genome not staged on this host.

description: BAM sort spills to scratch and fills the volume
log_text: Write failed: no space left on device while flushing sorted BAM output to /scratch/work.

description: Staging the input FASTQ from object storage times out repeatedly
log_text: Staging input FASTQ from s3 failed: Connection timed out after 3 retries.

description: Publishing outputs fails because the results dir is not writable
log_text: Cannot write to /results/output.bam: Permission denied (EACCES) while publishing outputs.

description: Task emits no trace update for hours and is terminated as stalled
log_text: Task produced no new output or trace update for 6 hours; the progress monitor terminated it as stalled (no forward progress).
